title: 10 best herbal essential oils for oily hair
description: Eucalyptus globulus, also known as Tasmanian blue gum, essential oils helps with oily hair because of its natural astringent and antiseptic properties. The oil's ability to reduce sebum production helps balance the scalp's natural moisture levels, minimizing the appearance of greasiness. Additionally, eucalyptus oil's decongestant properties help to improve blood circulation, promoting a healthy scalp and reducing oil buildup.
